reviews.comment:
Terrible!! llegué me voy a sentar con un amigo a tomar un cafe, como llegue antes camino hasta la verdad para ver si venía, y salió un pelo.. de dentro a los gritos que saque el auto, le expliqué que me iba a sentar a tomar un cafe que estaba esperando alguien, y seguía a los gritos llamando al encargado !! Llame a mi amigo y me fui a otro lugar, por algo estaba vacío el café!! Malísima atención, me ubiese preguntado primero antes de hacer semejante escándalo, una verdadera falta de respeto!!;lamento que el sistema me pida que por lo menos le de 1 estrella, no se lo merece

(Translated by Google)
Terrible!! I arrived and was going to sit down with a friend for a coffee. Since I arrived early, I walked over to the car to see if someone was coming, and a guy came out yelling at me to move my car. I explained that I was going to sit down for a coffee and that I was waiting for someone, and he kept yelling for the manager! I called my friend and went somewhere else; there was a reason the café was empty! The service was awful. He should have asked me first before making such a scene. It was a real lack of respect! I'm sorry the system is asking me to give it at least one star; it doesn't deserve it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1aGRYbzNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El jueves 21/7/2022 tuvimos una muy mala experiencia con el contingente que viajamos ya que el encargado del lugar fue sumamente maleducado y soberbio con el grupo total. Sobre todo mostraba su "jerarquía" con señoras mayores y prepoteaba a los más jóvenes. Sería interesante que puedan contar con personal idóneo si lo que pretenden es reactivar el turismo en su provincia. Realmente fue lamentable!!!

(Translated by Google)
On Thursday, July 21, 2022, we had a very bad experience with the group that traveled with us. The manager was extremely rude and arrogant toward the entire group. Above all, he showed his "hierarchy" toward older women and bullied younger people. It would be beneficial for them to have qualified staff if their goal is to revive tourism in their province. It was truly deplorable!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1MnFIazhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención falta de respeto y maltrato a un grupo de turismo con el que visité el lugar. Dejaron mucho que desear, desagradable.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, disrespect, and mistreatment of a tour group I visited the place with. They left much to be desired; unpleasant.

reviews.comment:
Pesima atencion, encargado mal educado, irrespetuoso con el grupo de viaje que visitamos San Juan. Mal trato a las mujeres esperando para entrar al baño. No le pondria ninguna estrella, no me deja sacarla. ACA e YPF deberían tomar nota de esto.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service, rude manager, disrespectful to the tour group visiting San Juan. He treated the women waiting to use the restroom poorly. I wouldn't give it zero stars; it won't let me remove one. ACA and YPF should take note of this.
